title: LOUISIANA LOCAL GOVERNMENT BUDGET ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 9.  LOUISIANA LOCAL GOVERNMENT BUDGET ACT

§1301.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Louisiana Local Government Budget Act."

Added by Acts 1980, No. 504, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 1980.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 9.  LOUISIANA LOCAL GOVERNMENT BUDGET ACT
§1301.  Short title

Added by Acts 1980, No. 504, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 1980.
